summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a smokin 1970 show highlighted by tight Good Lovin', Black Peter, Hard to Handle and crisp St. Stephen > Not Fade Away.
review: Both reviewers rave about this performance – they note superb pacing, seamless transitions and standout moments on Good Lovin', Black Peter, Hard to Handle and the St. Stephen > Not Fade Away sequence.  The recording is a soundboard source with no reported flaws, delivering clear, crisp audio that lets the band’s tight playing shine.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed 5‑star reviews praise both the musical performance and imply a high‑quality soundboard recording; with strong show quality and no noted technical issues, the rating is near the top of the scale.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific complaints; reviewers imply clear, crisp sound typical of a good soundboard capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Excellent pacing with smooth, well‑executed transitions between tunes.
